providers.name: Cloudflare Workers and Wrangler
needs_credentials: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and account id for live Workers/R2 operations

keep secrets and dashboard-side bindings app-owned
app_owned_boundaries: routes, custom domains, and gradual deployments

providers.name: Netlify
needs_credentials: NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN and site id for live deploys

avoid Netlify build execution unless approved

needs_credentials: bucket and endpoint configuration for live object writes
dx_can_do_now: plan object keys from static files
keep bucket, endpoint, and public URL values redacted
align with existing Forge R2/S3 dry-run object planning
